attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BATCH_ID,
PROJECT_DT_ID,
PROJECT_ID,
SEQ_ID,
STEP_ID,
ANSWER,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
DT_REVISION_ID,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CO_PROJECT_DT ECPD
WHERE ECPD.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
AND  NOT EXISTS 
				(
					SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CO_PROJECT_DT SCPD
					WHERE (ECPD.PROJECT_ID = SCPD.PROJECT_ID
					AND ECPD.DT_REVISION_ID = SCPD.DT_REVISION_ID)
				)

SELECT
BATCH_ID,
PROJECT_DT_ID,
PROJECT_ID,
SEQ_ID,
STEP_ID,
ANSWER,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
DT_REVISION_ID,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CO_PROJECT_DT_ANS ECPDA
WHERE ECPDA.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI' 
AND  NOT EXISTS 
				(
					SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CO_PROJECT_DT_ANS SCPDA
					WHERE ECPDA.PROJECT_ID = SCPDA.PROJECT_ID
				)

SELECT
BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,
BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_RVSN_INT,
BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_SQNC_INT,
COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_NUM_INT,
COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_TXT,
COO_PRJCT_Q_A_ANSWER_TXT,
CONCLUSION_TYPE,
CREATED_BY_DTM,
DV_CREATED_BY_DT,
LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
LAST_UPDATED_ON_DTM,
DV_LAST_UPDATED_ON_DT,
SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
RU_COO_PRJCT_Q_A_CNCLSN_RL_CD,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
START_TV_DT,
END_TV_DT,
ACTION_CODE,
DML_TYPE
FROM
(
	SELECT
	TOT.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,
	TOT.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_RVSN_INT,
	TOT.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_SQNC_INT,
	TOT.COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_NUM_INT,
	TOT.COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_TXT,
	TOT.COO_PRJCT_Q_A_ANSWER_TXT,
	TOT.CONCLUSION_TYPE,
	TOT.CREATED_BY_DTM,
	TOT.DV_CREATED_BY_DT,
	TOT.LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
	TOT.LAST_UPDATED_ON_DTM,
	TOT.DV_LAST_UPDATED_ON_DT,
	TOT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
	TOT.CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
	TOT.RU_COO_PRJCT_Q_A_CNCLSN_RL_CD,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
	TOT.START_TV_DT AS START_TV_DT,
	COALESCE(MAX(TOT.START_TV_DT - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER (PARTITION BY TOT.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,TOT.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_RVSN_INT,TOT.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_SQNC_INT ORDER BY TOT.START_TV_DT
			ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DT,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TOT.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,TOT.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_RVSN_INT,TOT.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_SQNC_INT ORDER BY TOT.START_TV_DT ASC) AS RANK_INDEX,
	TOT.ACTION_CODE ,
	(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 
		  AND (NCPRQAT.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME IS NOT NULL AND NCPRQAT.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_RVSN_INT IS NOT NULL AND NCPRQAT.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_SQNC_INT IS NOT NULL) 
		THEN 'U' 
		ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
	FROM
	(
		SELECT
		TIN.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,
		TIN.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_RVSN_INT,
		TIN.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_SQNC_INT,
		TIN.COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_NUM_INT,
		TIN.COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_TXT,
		TIN.COO_PRJCT_Q_A_ANSWER_TXT,
		TIN.CONCLUSION_TYPE,
		TIN.CREATED_BY_DTM,
		TIN.DV_CREATED_BY_DT,
		TIN.LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
		TIN.LAST_UPDATED_ON_DTM,
		TIN.DV_LAST_UPDATED_ON_DT,
		TIN.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
		TIN.CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
		TIN.RU_COO_PRJCT_Q_A_CNCLSN_RL_CD,
		TIN.START_TV_DT AS START_TV_DT ,
		TIN.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE,
		TIN.CREATE_DATETIME AS CREATE_DATETIME,
		ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TIN.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,TIN.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_RVSN_INT,TIN.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_SQNC_INT,
										TIN.COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_NUM_INT,TIN.COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_TXT,TIN.COO_PRJCT_Q_A_ANSWER_TXT,
										TIN.CONCLUSION_TYPE ,TIN.LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY, TIN.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
										TIN.CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,TIN.RU_COO_PRJCT_Q_A_CNCLSN_RL_CD
							ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM
		FROM
			(
				SELECT 
				BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,
				BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_RVSN_INT,
				BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_SQNC_INT,
				COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_NUM_INT,
				COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_TXT,
				COO_PRJCT_Q_A_ANSWER_TXT,
				CONCLUSION_TYPE,
				CREATED_BY_DTM,
				DV_CREATED_BY_DT,
				LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
				LAST_UPDATED_ON_DTM,
				DV_LAST_UPDATED_ON_DT,
				SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
				CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
				RU_COO_PRJCT_Q_A_CNCLSN_RL_CD,
				CAST(SCPDAU.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS DATE ) START_TV_DT ,
				'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
				SCPDAU.CREATE_DATETIME AS CREATE_DATETIME
				FROM
				(
					SELECT
					NCP.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME AS BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,
					COALESCE(SCPD.DT_REVISION_ID,-999) AS BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_RVSN_INT,
					COALESCE(SCPD.SEQ_ID,-999) AS BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_SQNC_INT,
					COALESCE(ECDS.TYPE_SEQ,-999) AS COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_NUM_INT,
					COALESCE(ECDS.STEP_DESC,'UNKNOWN') AS COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_TXT,
					COALESCE(SCPD.ANSWER,'UNKNOWN') AS COO_PRJCT_Q_A_ANSWER_TXT,
					'HARDWARE' AS CONCLUSION_TYPE, 
					SCPD.CREATED_DATE AS CREATED_BY_DTM,
					CAST(SCPD.CREATED_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_CREATED_BY_DT,
					COALESCE(NCWPU.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
					SCPD.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS LAST_UPDATED_ON_DTM,
					CAST(SCPD.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_LAST_UPDATED_ON_DT,
					'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
					COALESCE(NCWPC.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
					ECDS.RULE AS RU_COO_PRJCT_Q_A_CNCLSN_RL_CD,
					SCPD.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
					SCPD.CREATE_DATETIME AS CREATE_DATETIME
					FROM
					$$STGDB.ST_CO_PROJECT_DT SCPD

					INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PROJECT NCP
					ON (COALESCE(SCPD.PROJECT_ID,-999) = NCP.SK_PROJECT_ID_INT)

					INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CO_DT_STEPS ECDS 
					ON SCPD.STEP_ID = ECDS.STEP_ID

					LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPC
					ON (COALESCE(SCPD.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPC.CEC_ID)

					LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPU
					ON (COALESCE(SCPD.LAST_UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPU.CEC_ID )

					UNION ALL

					SELECT
					NCP.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME AS BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,
					COALESCE(SCPDA.DT_REVISION_ID,-999) AS BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_RVSN_INT,
					COALESCE(SCPDA.SEQ_ID,-999) AS BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_SQNC_INT,
					COALESCE(ECDS.TYPE_SEQ,-999) AS COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_NUM_INT,
					COALESCE(ECDS.STEP_DESC,'UNKNOWN') AS COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_TXT,
					COALESCE(SCPDA.ANSWER,'UNKNOWN') AS COO_PRJCT_Q_A_ANSWER_TXT,
					'SOFTWARE' AS CONCLUSION_TYPE, 
					SCPDA.CREATED_DATE AS CREATED_BY_DTM,
					CAST(SCPDA.CREATED_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_CREATED_BY_DT,
					COALESCE(NCWPU.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
					SCPDA.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS LAST_UPDATED_ON_DTM,
					CAST(SCPDA.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_LAST_UPDATED_ON_DT,
					'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
					COALESCE(NCWPC.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
					ECDS.RULE AS RU_COO_PRJCT_Q_A_CNCLSN_RL_CD,
					SCPDA.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
					SCPDA.CREATE_DATETIME AS CREATE_DATETIME
					FROM
					$$STGDB.ST_CO_PROJECT_DT_ANS SCPDA

					INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PROJECT NCP
					ON (COALESCE(SCPDA.PROJECT_ID,-999) = NCP.SK_PROJECT_ID_INT)

					INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CO_DT_STEPS ECDS 
					ON SCPDA.STEP_ID = ECDS.STEP_ID

					LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPC
					ON (COALESCE(SCPDA.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPC.CEC_ID)

					LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPU
					ON (COALESCE(SCPDA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPU.CEC_ID )
				) SCPDAU

				UNION ALL
				SELECT
				BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,
				BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_RVSN_INT,
				BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_SQNC_INT,
				COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_NUM_INT,
				COO_PRJCT_Q_A_QSTN_TXT,
				COO_PRJCT_Q_A_ANSWER_TXT,
				CONCLUSION_TYPE,
				CREATED_BY_DTM,
				DV_CREATED_BY_DT,
				LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
				LAST_UPDATED_ON_DTM,
				DV_LAST_UPDATED_ON_DT,
				SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
				CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
				RU_COO_PRJCT_Q_A_CNCLSN_RL_CD,
				START_TV_DT,
				'X' AS ACTION_CODE,
				EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS CREATE_DATETIME
				FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_TV NCPRQAT
				WHERE EXISTS
							(SELECT 1 FROM 
											( SELECT PROJECT_ID,DT_REVISION_ID,SEQ_ID FROM $$STGDB.ST_CO_PROJECT_DT
											UNION
											SELECT PROJECT_ID,DT_REVISION_ID,SEQ_ID FROM $$STGDB.ST_CO_PROJECT_DT_ANS		
											) SCPDA
											INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PROJECT NCP
											ON (COALESCE(SCPDA.PROJECT_ID,-999) = NCP.SK_PROJECT_ID_INT)
										WHERE  
										NCP.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME = NCPRQAT.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME
										AND SCPDA.DT_REVISION_ID = NCPRQAT.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_RVSN_INT
										AND	SCPDA.SEQ_ID = NCPRQAT.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_SQNC_INT
							)
				AND NCPRQAT.END_TV_DT=16000101
			)TIN
			QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TIN.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,TIN.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_RVSN_INT,TIN.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_SQNC_INT,TIN.START_TV_DT ORDER BY TIN.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) =1
	)TOT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_TV NCPRQAT
ON NCPRQAT.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME = TOT.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME
AND NCPRQAT.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_RVSN_INT  = TOT.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_RVSN_INT
AND NCPRQAT.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_SQNC_INT = TOT.BK_COO_PRJCT_RULE_Q_A_SQNC_INT
AND NCPRQAT.END_TV_DT = 16000101
WHERE ROW_NUM = 1
) A

SELECT
BATCH_ID,
PROJECT_DT_ID,
PROJECT_ID,
SEQ_ID,
STEP_ID,
ANSWER,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
DT_REVISION_ID,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 

$$STGDB.ST_CO_PROJECT_DT SCPD

WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PROJECT NCP
					INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CO_DT_STEPS ECDS 
					ON SCPD.STEP_ID = ECDS.STEP_ID
					INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPC
					ON (COALESCE(SCPD.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPC.CEC_ID)
					INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPU
					ON (COALESCE(SCPD.LAST_UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPU.CEC_ID )
					
					WHERE (COALESCE(SCPD.PROJECT_ID,-999) = NCP.SK_PROJECT_ID_INT)
				)

SELECT
BATCH_ID,
PROJECT_DT_ID,
PROJECT_ID,
SEQ_ID,
STEP_ID,
ANSWER,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
DT_REVISION_ID,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 

$$STGDB.ST_CO_PROJECT_DT_ANS SCPDA

WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PROJECT NCP
					INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CO_DT_STEPS ECDS 
					ON SCPDA.STEP_ID = ECDS.STEP_ID
					INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPC
					ON (COALESCE(SCPDA.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPC.CEC_ID)
					INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPU
					ON (COALESCE(SCPDA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPU.CEC_ID )
					
					WHERE (COALESCE(SCPDA.PROJECT_ID,-999) = NCP.SK_PROJECT_ID_INT)
				)
